TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Pey-lu-te, title = Pey-lu-te, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pey-lu-te} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Pey-lu-te "Ala-pow a kamu, ō®ŔäōĪŔąō™‚Äé" u angangan nu Li-pa-nen, tini i Pey-lu-te a kuwan lilis tu Ti-cong-hay, uyni a kanatal nu satabakiay a minatu nu bayu, singangan aca tu nuwalian adidi'ay a Pa-li. zayhan ayza caay pikinsa tu tademaw, ahacica ku tademaw caay katineng. 2007 a mihcaan ku piasip iza ku 100 emang katukuh 200 emang a laed. uyni a nganngan nu kitizaan saayaway tahkal i Ku-ay-ci nu A-ma-al-na a cudadan, likisi amikilim tu naayaway katukuh ayaw nu si-yen15 se-ci, izaw ku ku muenengay nu tadedmaw, atu belaw a kanatal Si-li-ya a Ta-ma-s-ke a mala u sabalakiay tu a tukay nu kitakit. 2007 . Pey-lu-te caay ku Li-pa-nen ce-bu a kitizaan dada', namahiza sakay Li-pa-nen a kezay amana pisaadidi' miazih. Pey-lu-te cung-yang kitizaan, Ha-mu-la zazan A-sen-la-pey-ye kitizaan yadah ku kusi atu gingku. zuma iza henay yadah ku singanganay cu-pan-se, pipaazihan, labiiay a nikauzip, namahiza mala u kitizaan nu pulung nu lalangawan, iza ku nu Cong-tung Li-pa-nen a sabangcalay a ngangan. 20 a ziday tu sazikuzay a mihcaan zayhan mapeci' tu namangangayaw ku Li-pa-nen, tuna muliyaw patizeng. . duduc nu kitakit atu kitakit a tukay migingkiw tu wangle "GaWC" tu nisakamu "kitakiday a tukay" a nganganan, An-man tungus u nu Betayay kanatal a tukay 2009 a mihcaan "Niw-ye a sinbun" mala u sakapahay a piliwkuan a tukuy, lecad a mihcaan tabihaway a bunac pala u sikengay a tukay i kitakit. duduc tu Ay-se anipalita 2010 a mihcaan tu pigingkiw, Pey-lu-te sa nu Cow-tung palalecad nu palawpesay nu tukay u sakasepat, i tatudungay ku nikaizaw nu kanatalay a pasilsil u saka 15. 2011 a mihcaan, Wan-se-ta sakamu tu Pey-lu-te u Cong-tung atu Bey-cow nu miliwkuay nu palawpesay tu sakatusa nu talakaway a tukay. Pey-lu-te yadah tu ku nikawawan tu kitakitay nu mitukaday tu mali a kadademec 1957 a mihcaan atu 1997 a mihcaan Ba-A-la-pow a undukayan. naayaway a ziday, mangangayaw ku Li-pa-nen atu Pey-lu-te a minatuay tabaki ku nibakuhac mapeci' tu ku tukay. Pey-lu-te a lalangawan namaliyaw patizeng. Lu-te kasumamadan a ngangan "be'erot" han "u imi tebun a tukay" nu Be-ni-ci a nipatizeng. saayaway pakayniay likisi a nisulitan tatenga' a ziday ayaw nu kung-yen tu 15 a se-cian, ayza matutu' tu i sye-sin ku sulit padepitan i sapad musakamu tuyni a tukay. u kasumamadayay nu midebungay u i sa'wacanay zayhan u masaupuay nu lala' a subal. na tukay i kasumamadan mapangangan tu "Berytus", uyni a ngangan i 1934 a mihcaan mayung tu nu Pey-lu-te Amilika talakaway a cacudadan i-su atu ke-syeay patahkal musakamu tu nisulitan tu kasumamadanay. ť≠ĮÁČĻŚŹ§ŚźćÁāļ"be'erot" , "Berytus", . i ayaw nu kung-yen 140 a mkihcaan, Pey-lu-te a tukuy ci Ti-aw-tow-te.Te-li-bung atu ci An-tyaw-ke-ci-se a laed tu Say-liw kasumamadan a hungti i kalaalawan mapeci'tu. Pey-lu-te dadawa i Si-la a lalangawan sibalucu a muliyaw patizeng, sumad hank u ngangan "Laodicea in Canaan" mikining tu Say-liw-si a hungtian tu cacay tatayna a hungti. ayzaay a Pey-lu-te niyazu' patizeng i malumanay a niyazu'an, i 1991 a mihcaan Li-pa-nen ayaw nu kalepu nu kangangayaw, caay kakatuud a taneng malepun ku pigingkiw tu nu kasumamadan tu sakay Pey-lu-tean. ayza i kasaupuanay nu tukay nisubelidan nu kasumamadan pabinawlan migingkiw tu kasumamadanay a tuud. ayaw nu kung-yen cacay a lasubu a mihcaan tu teban, Berytus " kasumamadan a ngangan ku Pey-lu-te" maina i kalibuwaan ku masepiay Di'tu a tatayna Ti-ke a tangah. kilibuwa a belih u tukay a bacu, cacay a hay-tun mibedbed i sakulawi' nu balinga. uyni a bacu i 15 a se-ci nu Wi-ni-s macalap tu nu miing-swaay ci A-al-tu-s.Ma-nu-ti-u-s. ŚÖ¨ŚÖÉŚČćšłÄšłĖÁīÄšł≠śúü,Berytus . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan a
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô "ar~…ĺa-pow a kamu, ******" u aŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺi-pa-n…ôn, tini i p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô a kuwan r~…ĺir~…ĺis tu ti- ¶oŇč-ńßaj, ujni a kanatar~…ĺ nu satabakiaj a minatu nu baju, siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu nuwar~…ĺian adidi Ē~ °aj a pa-r~…ĺi. zajńßan ajza ¶aaj pikinsa tu tad…ômaw, ańßa ¶i ¶a ku tad…ômaw ¶aaj katin…ôŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan ku piasip iza ku *** …ômaŇč katukuńß *** …ômaŇč a r~…ĺa…ôd. ujni a ŇčanŇčan nu kitizaan saajawaj tańßkar~…ĺ i ku-aj- ¶i nu a-ma-ar~…ĺ-na a ¶udadan, r~…ĺikisi amikir~…ĺim tu naajawaj katukuńß ajaw nu si-j…ôn** s…ô- ¶i, izaw ku ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj nu tad…ôdmaw, atu b…ôr~…ĺaw a kanatar~…ĺ si-r~…ĺi-ja a ta-ma-s-k…ô a mar~…ĺa u sabar~…ĺakiaj tu a tukaj nu kitakit. **** . p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô ¶aaj ku r~…ĺi-pa-n…ôn ¶…ô-bu a kitizaan dada Ē~ °, namańßiza sakaj r~…ĺi-pa-n…ôn a k…ôzaj amana pisaadidi Ē~ ° miazińß. p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô ¶uŇč-jaŇč kitizaan, ńßa-mu-r~…ĺa zazan a-s…ôn-r~…ĺa-p…ô-j…ô kitizaan jadańß ku kusi atu giŇčku. zuma iza ńß…ônaj jadańß ku siŇčaŇčanaj ¶u-pan-s…ô, pipaazińßan, r~…ĺabiiaj a nikauzip, namańßiza mar~…ĺa u kitizaan nu pur~…ĺuŇč nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, iza ku nu ¶oŇč-tuŇč r~…ĺi-pa-n…ôn a sabaŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a ŇčaŇčan. ** a zidaj tu sazikuzaj a mińß ¶aan zajńßan map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° tu namaŇčaŇčajaw ku r~…ĺi-pa-n…ôn, tuna mur~…ĺijaw patiz…ôŇč. . dudu ¶ nu kitakit atu kitakit a tukaj migiŇčkiw tu waŇčr~…ĺ…ô "gaw ¶" tu nisakamu "kitakidaj a tukaj" a ŇčaŇčanan, an-man tuŇčus u nu b…ôtajaj kanatar~…ĺ a tukaj **** a mińß ¶aan "niw-j…ô a sinbun" mar~…ĺa u sakapańßaj a pir~…ĺiwkuan a tukuj, r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mińß ¶aan tabińßawaj a buna ¶ par~…ĺa u sik…ôŇčaj a tukaj i kitakit. dudu ¶ tu aj-s…ô anipar~…ĺita **** a mińß ¶aan tu pigiŇčkiw, p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô sa nu ¶ow-tuŇč par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu par~…ĺawp…ôsaj nu tukaj u sakas…ôpat, i tatuduŇčaj ku nikaizaw nu kanatar~…ĺaj a pasir~…ĺsir~…ĺ u saka **. **** a mińß ¶aan, wan-s…ô-ta sakamu tu p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô u ¶oŇč-tuŇč atu b…ô- ¶ow nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj nu par~…ĺawp…ôsaj tu sakatusa nu tar~…ĺakawaj a tukaj. p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô jadańß tu ku nikawawan tu kitakitaj nu mitukadaj tu mar~…ĺi a kadad…ôm…ô ¶ **** a mińß ¶aan atu **** a mińß ¶aan ba-a-r~…ĺa-pow a undukajan. naajawaj a zidaj, maŇčaŇčajaw ku r~…ĺi-pa-n…ôn atu p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô a minatuaj tabaki ku nibakuńßa ¶ map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° tu ku tukaj. p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan namar~…ĺijaw patiz…ôŇč. r~…ĺu-t…ô kasumamadan a ŇčaŇčan "b…ô Ē~ °…ôrot" ńßan "u imi t…ôbun a tukaj" nu b…ô-ni- ¶i a nipatiz…ôŇč. saajawaj pakajniaj r~…ĺikisi a nisur~…ĺitan tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° a zidaj ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn tu ** a s…ô- ¶ian, ajza matutu Ē~ ° tu i sj…ô-sin ku sur~…ĺit pad…ôpitan i sapad musakamu tujni a tukaj. u kasumamadajaj nu mid…ôbuŇčaj u i sa Ē~ °wa ¶anaj zajńßan u masaupuaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a subar~…ĺ. na tukaj i kasumamadan mapaŇčaŇčan tu "b…ôrjtus", ujni a ŇčaŇčan i **** a mińß ¶aan majuŇč tu nu p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô amir~…ĺika tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan i-su atu k…ô-sj…ôaj patańßkar~…ĺ musakamu tu nisur~…ĺitan tu kasumamadanaj. *****"b…ô Ē~ °…ôrot" , "b…ôrjtus", . i ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn *** a mkińß ¶aan, p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô a tukuj ¶i ti-aw-tow-t…ô.t…ô-r~…ĺi-buŇč atu ¶i an-tjaw-k…ô- ¶i-s…ô a r~…ĺa…ôd tu saj-r~…ĺiw kasumamadan a ńßuŇčti i kar~…ĺaar~…ĺawan map…ô ¶i Ē~ °tu. p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô dadawa i si-r~…ĺa a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan sibar~…ĺu ¶u a mur~…ĺijaw patiz…ôŇč, sumad ńßank u ŇčaŇčan "r~…ĺaodi ¶…ôa in ¶anaan" mikiniŇč tu saj-r~…ĺiw-si a ńßuŇčtian tu ¶a ¶aj tatajna a ńßuŇčti. ajzaaj a p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô nijazu Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč i mar~…ĺumanaj a nijazu Ē~ °an, i **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺi-pa-n…ôn ajaw nu kar~…ĺ…ôpu nu kaŇčaŇčajaw, ¶aaj kakatuud a tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺ…ôpun ku pigiŇčkiw tu nu kasumamadan tu sakaj p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ôan. ajza i kasaupuanaj nu tukaj nisub…ôr~…ĺidan nu kasumamadan pabinawr~…ĺan migiŇčkiw tu kasumamadanaj a tuud. ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan tu t…ôban, b…ôrjtus " kasumamadan a ŇčaŇčan ku p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô" maina i kar~…ĺibuwaan ku mas…ôpiaj di Ē~ °tu a tatajna ti-k…ô a taŇčańß. kir~…ĺibuwa a b…ôr~…ĺińß u tukaj a ba ¶u, ¶a ¶aj a ńßaj-tun mib…ôdb…ôd i sakur~…ĺawi Ē~ ° nu bar~…ĺiŇča. ujni a ba ¶u i ** a s…ô- ¶i nu wi-ni-s ma ¶ar~…ĺap tu nu miiŇč-swaaj ¶i a-ar~…ĺ-tu-s.ma-nu-ti-u-s. ********,b…ôrjtus . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan a
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Pey-lu-te "Ala-pow a kamu, ō®ŔäōĪŔąō™‚Äé" u angangan nu Li-pa-nen, tini i Pey-lu-te a kuwan lilis tu Ti-cong-hay, uyni a kanatal nu satabakiay a minatu nu bayu, singangan aca tu nuwalian adidi'ay a Pa-li. zayhan ayza caay pikinsa tu tademaw, ahacica ku tademaw caay katineng. 2007 a mihcaan ku piasip iza ku 100 emang katukuh 200 emang a laed. uyni a nganngan nu kitizaan saayaway tahkal i Ku-ay-ci nu A-ma-al-na a cudadan, likisi amikilim tu naayaway katukuh ayaw nu si-yen15 se-ci, izaw ku ku muenengay nu tadedmaw, atu belaw a kanatal Si-li-ya a Ta-ma-s-ke a mala u sabalakiay tu a tukay nu kitakit. 2007 . Pey-lu-te caay ku Li-pa-nen ce-bu a kitizaan dada', namahiza sakay Li-pa-nen a kezay amana pisaadidi' miazih. Pey-lu-te cung-yang kitizaan, Ha-mu-la zazan A-sen-la-pey-ye kitizaan yadah ku kusi atu gingku. zuma iza henay yadah ku singanganay cu-pan-se, pipaazihan, labiiay a nikauzip, namahiza mala u kitizaan nu pulung nu lalangawan, iza ku nu Cong-tung Li-pa-nen a sabangcalay a ngangan. 20 a ziday tu sazikuzay a mihcaan zayhan mapeci' tu namangangayaw ku Li-pa-nen, tuna muliyaw patizeng. . duduc nu kitakit atu kitakit a tukay migingkiw tu wangle "GaWC" tu nisakamu "kitakiday a tukay" a nganganan, An-man tungus u nu Betayay kanatal a tukay 2009 a mihcaan "Niw-ye a sinbun" mala u sakapahay a piliwkuan a tukuy, lecad a mihcaan tabihaway a bunac pala u sikengay a tukay i kitakit. duduc tu Ay-se anipalita 2010 a mihcaan tu pigingkiw, Pey-lu-te sa nu Cow-tung palalecad nu palawpesay nu tukay u sakasepat, i tatudungay ku nikaizaw nu kanatalay a pasilsil u saka 15. 2011 a mihcaan, Wan-se-ta sakamu tu Pey-lu-te u Cong-tung atu Bey-cow nu miliwkuay nu palawpesay tu sakatusa nu talakaway a tukay. Pey-lu-te yadah tu ku nikawawan tu kitakitay nu mitukaday tu mali a kadademec 1957 a mihcaan atu 1997 a mihcaan Ba-A-la-pow a undukayan. naayaway a ziday, mangangayaw ku Li-pa-nen atu Pey-lu-te a minatuay tabaki ku nibakuhac mapeci' tu ku tukay. Pey-lu-te a lalangawan namaliyaw patizeng. Lu-te kasumamadan a ngangan "be'erot" han "u imi tebun a tukay" nu Be-ni-ci a nipatizeng. saayaway pakayniay likisi a nisulitan tatenga' a ziday ayaw nu kung-yen tu 15 a se-cian, ayza matutu' tu i sye-sin ku sulit padepitan i sapad musakamu tuyni a tukay. u kasumamadayay nu midebungay u i sa'wacanay zayhan u masaupuay nu lala' a subal. na tukay i kasumamadan mapangangan tu "Berytus", uyni a ngangan i 1934 a mihcaan mayung tu nu Pey-lu-te Amilika talakaway a cacudadan i-su atu ke-syeay patahkal musakamu tu nisulitan tu kasumamadanay. ť≠ĮÁČĻŚŹ§ŚźćÁāļ"be'erot" , "Berytus", . i ayaw nu kung-yen 140 a mkihcaan, Pey-lu-te a tukuy ci Ti-aw-tow-te.Te-li-bung atu ci An-tyaw-ke-ci-se a laed tu Say-liw kasumamadan a hungti i kalaalawan mapeci'tu. Pey-lu-te dadawa i Si-la a lalangawan sibalucu a muliyaw patizeng, sumad hank u ngangan "Laodicea in Canaan" mikining tu Say-liw-si a hungtian tu cacay tatayna a hungti. ayzaay a Pey-lu-te niyazu' patizeng i malumanay a niyazu'an, i 1991 a mihcaan Li-pa-nen ayaw nu kalepu nu kangangayaw, caay kakatuud a taneng malepun ku pigingkiw tu nu kasumamadan tu sakay Pey-lu-tean. ayza i kasaupuanay nu tukay nisubelidan nu kasumamadan pabinawlan migingkiw tu kasumamadanay a tuud. ayaw nu kung-yen cacay a lasubu a mihcaan tu teban, Berytus " kasumamadan a ngangan ku Pey-lu-te" maina i kalibuwaan ku masepiay Di'tu a tatayna Ti-ke a tangah. kilibuwa a belih u tukay a bacu, cacay a hay-tun mibedbed i sakulawi' nu balinga. uyni a bacu i 15 a se-ci nu Wi-ni-s macalap tu nu miing-swaay ci A-al-tu-s.Ma-nu-ti-u-s. ŚÖ¨ŚÖÉŚČćšłÄšłĖÁīÄšł≠śúü,Berytus . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan a

r~…ĺi-pa-n…ôn atu p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô a minatuaj tabaki ku nibakuńßa ¶ map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° tu ku tukaj. p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan namar~…ĺijaw patiz…ôŇč. r~…ĺu-t…ô kasumamadan a ŇčaŇčan "b…ô Ē~ °…ôrot" ńßan "u imi t…ôbun a tukaj" nu b…ô-ni- ¶i a nipatiz…ôŇč. saajawaj pakajniaj r~…ĺikisi a nisur~…ĺitan tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° a zidaj ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn tu ** a s…ô- ¶ian, ajza matutu Ē~ ° tu i sj…ô-sin ku sur~…ĺit pad…ôpitan i sapad musakamu tujni a tukaj. u kasumamadajaj nu mid…ôbuŇčaj u i sa Ē~ °wa ¶anaj zajńßan u masaupuaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a subar~…ĺ. na tukaj i kasumamadan mapaŇčaŇčan tu "b…ôrjtus", ujni a ŇčaŇčan i **** a mińß ¶aan majuŇč tu nu p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô amir~…ĺika tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan i-su atu k…ô-sj…ôaj patańßkar~…ĺ musakamu tu nisur~…ĺitan tu kasumamadanaj. *****"b…ô Ē~ °…ôrot" , "b…ôrjtus", . i ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn *** a mkińß ¶aan, p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô a tukuj ¶i ti-aw-tow-t…ô.t…ô-r~…ĺi-buŇč atu ¶i an-tjaw-k…ô- ¶i-s…ô a r~…ĺa…ôd tu saj-r~…ĺiw kasumamadan a ńßuŇčti i kar~…ĺaar~…ĺawan map…ô ¶i Ē~ °tu. p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô dadawa i si-r~…ĺa a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan sibar~…ĺu ¶u a mur~…ĺijaw patiz…ôŇč, sumad ńßank u ŇčaŇčan "r~…ĺaodi ¶…ôa in ¶anaan" mikiniŇč tu saj-r~…ĺiw-si a ńßuŇčtian tu ¶a ¶aj tatajna a ńßuŇčti. ajzaaj a p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô nijazu Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč i mar~…ĺumanaj a nijazu Ē~ °an, i **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺi-pa-n…ôn ajaw nu kar~…ĺ…ôpu nu kaŇčaŇčajaw, ¶aaj kakatuud a tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺ…ôpun ku pigiŇčkiw tu nu kasumamadan tu sakaj p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ôan. ajza i kasaupuanaj nu tukaj nisub…ôr~…ĺidan nu kasumamadan pabinawr~…ĺan migiŇčkiw tu kasumamadanaj a tuud. ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan tu t…ôban, b…ôrjtus " kasumamadan a ŇčaŇčan ku p…ô-r~…ĺu-t…ô" maina i kar~…ĺibuwaan ku mas…ôpiaj di Ē~ °tu a tatajna ti-k…ô a taŇčańß. kir~…ĺibuwa a b…ôr~…ĺińß u tukaj a ba ¶u, ¶a ¶aj a ńßaj-tun mib…ôdb…ôd i sakur~…ĺawi Ē~ ° nu bar~…ĺiŇča. ujni a ba ¶u i ** a s…ô- ¶i nu wi-ni-s ma ¶ar~…ĺap tu nu miiŇč-swaaj ¶i a-ar~…ĺ-tu-s.ma-nu-ti-u-s. ********,b…ôrjtus .
